title: NVDA earnings honestly feels like one of the biggest reports the market has focused on this year.
author: lnashik6
selftext:
Earlier this year Trump disclosed that he bought NVDA . Pelosi discussions started coming back again. Tuberville was also reportedly increasing semiconductor exposure around the same time. 

To me, that says smart money still wants exposure to AI instead of rotating away from it.

So rather than blindly trading the earnings candle, I ran the scenario through Bitget’s GetAgent to structure both sides before the report drops.

Bullish scenario:

If NVDA beats and buyers keep control after the initial volatility, this is the setup I’m watching:

• Entry: 272.80

• Take Profit 1: 283.8

• Take Profit 2: 289.4

• Invalidation: daily close below 278.4

Bearish scenario:

If guidance disappoints or earnings fail to hold momentum, I’m more interested in the failed breakout and liquidity sweep instead of forcing long positions into weakness.

The main thing I liked was that GetAgent wasn’t just throwing moon targets around. It actually mapped entries, invalidation, exits, and risk structure before the event even starts.

Between the China chip approval headlines, AI demand still staying aggressive, and NVDA already growing revenue 73% YoY, this earnings report feels like one of the highest attention setups we’ve had in a while.

I have droppped the GetAgent prompt and setup screenshots for ppl who might be interested.

How are you planning to trade NVDA earnings?

comments.author: lnashik6
comments.body:
1st prompt: 'Give me insights on NVDA earnings and tell me which politicians also bought NVDA around the same time as trump. Are they selling or buying more?'

2nd prompt - 'if you were to set a trade for me how would you do it?'
